title: Fashion Avenue & Luxury Retail
description: The Dubai Mall hosts 1,200+ stores including the world's largest collection of fashion brands under one roof—anchored by Fashion Avenue's luxury wing.

hero.title: Global luxury, singular address
hero.description: Flagship boutiques, mono-brand formats, and experiential retail concepts benefit from tourism density, tax-free appeal, and year-round seasonality.

items.title: Fashion Avenue
items.description: Dedicated luxury precinct with premium finishes, concierge adjacency, and the highest concentration of international maisons in the region.

items.title: Luxury Wing & Adjacencies
items.description: Expandable luxury corridors designed for halo brands, limited editions, and appointment-led retail.

items.title: Global Flagship Formats
items.description: Double-height storefronts and experience-led formats for brands launching or scaling across MENA.

items.title: Lifestyle & Premium High Street
items.description: Bridge between luxury and aspirational segments—capturing regional shoppers and visiting tourists.

items.title: Category Depth
items.description: Electronics, beauty, home, and entertainment retail clusters drive basket size and repeat visitation.
